# NexMoney

> NexMoney Ltd is an FCA-regulated, whole-of-market mortgage and insurance broker based in Bournemouth, Dorset, UK. We compare hundreds of lenders to find the best mortgage for first-time buyers, home movers, remortgagers and buy-to-let investors, and arrange protection insurance (life, critical illness, income protection). Appointed Representative of Stonebridge Mortgage Solutions Ltd (FCA reference 610875).

Key facts:
- Location: Bournemouth, Dorset — serving Poole, Christchurch, Wimborne and all of the UK
- Phone: 01202 802 677 · Email: info@nexmoney.co.uk
- Whole-of-market: not tied to any lender or panel
- Typical broker fee: £375 (many remortgages fee-free); always disclosed upfront
- Hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00, Sat 09:00–13:00

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/): Overview, borrowing calculator, how the process works
- [Mortgages](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/mortgages): First-time buyer, remortgage, home mover, buy-to-let, self-build, shared ownership
- [First Time Buyer Mortgages Bournemouth](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/first-time-buyer-mortgages-bournemouth): Deposits from 5%, Lifetime ISA, shared ownership, local market guidance
- [Remortgage Bournemouth](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/remortgage-bournemouth): Rate switches, product transfers vs remortgage, capital raising — start 6 months before your fix ends
- [Buy-to-Let Mortgages Dorset](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/buy-to-let-mortgages-dorset): Personal & limited company BTL, rental cover, HMOs, holiday lets, portfolio landlords
- [Services](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/services): Life insurance, critical illness, income protection, buildings insurance, bridging and development finance, conveyancing
- [Calculators](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/calculators): How much can I borrow, monthly repayments, overpayments, rental yield
- [FAQ](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/faq): Common mortgage questions answered — deposits, bad credit, broker fees, timelines
- [About](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/about): Who we are and how we're regulated
- [Contact](https://www.nexmoney.co.uk/contact): Free, no-obligation mortgage advice

## Important

Your home may be repossessed if you do not keep up repayments on your mortgage. The FCA does not regulate most buy-to-let mortgages.
